aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta tags, headers, and content with relevant keywords for HVAC services in Round Rock, Texas.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) opportunity but lacks a verified and optimized profile.

critical_issues: Missing essential business information such as hours of operation, services, and photos.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and update business listings on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Monitor and manage citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

FAQ schema to address common customer questions.
